title: 10 best herbal creams for mucus in stomach
description: Foeniculum vulgare, also known as fennel, creams helps with mucus in stomach because of its carminative properties. The active compounds in fennulic acid and anethole found in fennel help to relax the digestive muscles and improve digestion. This reduces the production of excess mucus in the stomach, alleviating symptoms of indigestion and bloating.
